productDecisionGate.fixMapRow: FLOW-13 | Data Warehouse | stop: product decision required before continuing first | tenant context service decoupling | configuration key scoping | co-install dependency declaration | unit test layer MEDIUM | cascade requirement
productDecisionGate.fixMapQuestion: Analytics CROSS_FLOW_DESIGN_LOCK: define acceptable Docker minimum?
productDecisionGate.decision: The acceptable Docker minimum for FLOW-13 certification is the existing XIIGen Docker Desktop platform stack: docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.platform.yml, Vault, server, and local npm registry. External warehouse services are not required for Phase 0, Phase 1, or fork/auth certification unless a tenant adapter explicitly ships such a connector. Cross-flow analytics dependencies must be declared as co-install metadata and not bundled as hidden upstream source.
productDecisionGate.operatorOverride: Luba instructed the session to continue flows 13-46 with the same plan and protocol on 2026-05-06.

servicesMissingMicroserviceBase.command: Select-String -Path server/src/engine/flows/data-warehouse-analytics/**/*.ts -Pattern '^export class.*Service' excluding spec files and requiring extends MicroserviceBase
